title: Introduction to Artificial Intelligence with Brian Yu - Chapter 6 - Generating (live, unedited)
summary: CS50 is Harvard University's introduction to computer science and programming offered through multiple platforms including edX, Harvard Extension School, and Harvard Summer School. Chapter 6 focuses on generative AI techniques taught by Brian Yu and David J. Malan.
writeup: This CS50 chapter, taught by Brian Yu, covers generative AI as part of Harvard University's introduction to artificial intelligence. The session is presented live and unedited, the sixth chapter in a sequence on AI techniques. CS50 is offered through edX, Harvard Extension School, and Harvard Summer School, with David J. Malan among the instructors.
